narrative:
Colerain Twp. township has 41,824 registered voters, with 58.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.6%, a modest Republican lean of 4.2 percentage points.
